---
title: "Intrabeam Collisions, Gas, and Electron Effects"
subtitle: USPAS Beam Physics with Intense Space Charge
author:
  - name: Austin Hoover
    affiliation: Oak Ridge National Laboratory
  - name: John Barnard
    affiliation: Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory
toc: true
bibliography: references.bib 
csl: aps.csl
---


# Beam-beam coulomb collisions

# Beam-gas scattering

# Charge-changing processes

# Gas pressure instability

# Electron cloud processes

# Electron-ion instability
